properties.name: Coeur d'Alene Upper Pressure Zone
properties.ownerOperator: City of Coeur d'Alene Water Department
properties.sourceBasis: Public city water plan text confirms the zone and references Figure 3-2 as the pressure-zone boundary map, but this repository does not yet include a traced polygon.
publicNotes: The Industrial Standpipe is documented as a steel standpipe on the Upper Pressure Zone.
The standpipe supplies the Upper Zone, which can supply the General Pressure Zone via pressure-reducing valves.
A 2018 city council record says the standpipe was built to provide enhanced storage, pump-failure reserve capacity, and fire-flow support for the Upper Pressure Zone in the northwestern corridor.
The 2012 water plan says Figure 3-2 shows six existing pressure zones and one recommended future pressure zone.

sources.label: City of Coeur d'Alene 2012 Water System Comprehensive Plan Update
